channel.title: World
channel.description: The Washington Post World section provides information and analysis of breaking world news stories. In addition to our world news and video, Post World News offers discussions and blogs on major international news and economic issues.

item.title: A condemnation of Putin in glitzy Cannes is not enough for beleaguered Ukrainians
item.dc:creator: Gerry Shih, Anastacia Galouchka
item.description: Andrei Zvyagintsev urged Russian President Vladimir Putin to end the “bloodbath” — but in Ukraine his remarks elicited ridicule and frustration.

item.title: Lebanon ceasefire falters as Trump pushes for Iran deal
item.dc:creator: Sammy Westfall, Mohamad El Chamaa, Suzan Haidamous, Lior Soroka, Susannah George
item.description: Israel is “deepening its operation” in Lebanon, Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said.

item.title: False Ebola claims run wild as Congo outbreak worsens
item.dc:creator: Rael Ombuor, Rachel Chason, Lauren Weber
item.description: Distrust and violence flare in the Democratic Republic of Congo as false claims spread that the outbreak — and the disease itself — is a hoax.
